# Database Schema Reference

**Auto-generated from `src/db/schema.ts`**  
**Last updated:** 2025-11-09

> ⚠️ **Do not edit this file manually.** It is auto-generated from source code.  
> To update, run: `npm run docs:generate -- --schema`

---

## Overview

MyloWare uses PostgreSQL 15+ with the pgvector extension.

**Key tables:**
- `execution_traces` - Trace state machine
- `memories` - Vector + relational memory storage
- `personas` - AI agent configuration
- `projects` - Production type configuration
- `agent_webhooks` - Webhook registration
- `sessions` - Conversation state
- `video_generation_jobs` - Async video job tracking
- `edit_jobs` - Async edit job tracking

For architectural overview, see [Data Model](../02-architecture/data-model.md).

---

## Schema Generation

To inspect the current schema:

```bash
# Generate schema SQL
npx drizzle-kit generate

# Push to database
npx drizzle-kit push

# View schema
psql $DATABASE_URL -c "\d+ execution_traces"
```

---

## Table Definitions

### execution_traces

Trace state machine for agent coordination.

```sql
CREATE TABLE execution_traces (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  trace_id TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  project_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  session_id TEXT,
  current_owner TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'casey',
  previous_owner TEXT,
  workflow_step INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  instructions TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
  completed_at TIMESTAMP,
  metadata JSONB DEFAULT '{}'
);

CREATE INDEX idx_execution_traces_trace_id ON execution_traces(trace_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_execution_traces_status ON execution_traces(status);
CREATE INDEX idx_execution_traces_current_owner ON execution_traces(current_owner);
```

---

### memories

Vector + relational memory storage.

```sql
CREATE TABLE memories (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  content TEXT NOT NULL,
  summary TEXT,
  embedding VECTOR(1536) NOT NULL,
  memory_type TEXT NOT NULL,
  persona TEXT[] DEFAULT '{}',
  project TEXT[] DEFAULT '{}',
  tags TEXT[] DEFAULT '{}',
  related_to UUID[] DEFAULT '{}',
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
  last_accessed_at TIMESTAMP,
  access_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  metadata JSONB DEFAULT '{}'
);

-- Vector similarity index (HNSW)
CREATE INDEX idx_memories_embedding ON memories 
USING hnsw (embedding vector_cosine_ops);

-- Array containment indices (GIN)
CREATE INDEX idx_memories_persona ON memories USING gin(persona);
CREATE INDEX idx_memories_project ON memories USING gin(project);
CREATE INDEX idx_memories_tags ON memories USING gin(tags);

-- Full-text search index
CREATE INDEX idx_memories_content_fts ON memories 
USING gin(to_tsvector('english', content));

-- Metadata index
CREATE INDEX idx_memories_metadata ON memories USING gin(metadata);
```

---

### personas

AI agent configuration.

```sql
CREATE TABLE personas (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  name TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  title TEXT NOT NULL,
  system_prompt TEXT NOT NULL,
  allowed_tools TEXT[] DEFAULT '{}',
  guardrails JSONB DEFAULT '{}',
  metadata JSONB DEFAULT '{}',
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE INDEX idx_personas_name ON personas(name);
```

---

### projects

Production type configuration.

```sql
CREATE TABLE projects (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  slug TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  name TEXT NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  workflow TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
  optional_steps TEXT[] DEFAULT '{}',
  specs JSONB DEFAULT '{}',
  guardrails JSONB DEFAULT '{}',
  metadata JSONB DEFAULT '{}',
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE INDEX idx_projects_slug ON projects(slug);
```

---

### agent_webhooks

Webhook registration for agent handoffs.

```sql
CREATE TABLE agent_webhooks (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  agent_name TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  webhook_path TEXT NOT NULL,
  method TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'POST',
  auth_type TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'none',
  auth_config JSONB DEFAULT '{}',
  description TEXT,
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true,
  timeout_ms INTEGER,
  metadata JSONB DEFAULT '{}',
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE INDEX idx_agent_webhooks_agent_name ON agent_webhooks(agent_name);
CREATE INDEX idx_agent_webhooks_is_active ON agent_webhooks(is_active);
```

---

### sessions

Conversation state management.

```sql
CREATE TABLE sessions (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  session_id TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  persona TEXT,
  project TEXT,
  context JSONB DEFAULT '{}',
  conversation_history JSONB[] DEFAULT '{}',
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE INDEX idx_sessions_session_id ON sessions(session_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_sessions_user_id ON sessions(user_id);
```

---

### video_generation_jobs

Async video generation job tracking.

```sql
CREATE TABLE video_generation_jobs (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  job_id TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  trace_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  screenplay_id UUID,
  provider TEXT NOT NULL,
  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'queued',
  video_url TEXT,
  error TEXT,
  started_at TIMESTAMP,
  completed_at TIMESTAMP,
  metadata JSONB DEFAULT '{}',
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE INDEX idx_video_generation_jobs_trace_id ON video_generation_jobs(trace_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_video_generation_jobs_status ON video_generation_jobs(status);
```

---

### edit_jobs

Async video editing job tracking.

```sql
CREATE TABLE edit_jobs (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  job_id TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  trace_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  input_video_urls TEXT[] NOT NULL,
  provider TEXT NOT NULL,
  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'queued',
  output_url TEXT,
  error TEXT,
  started_at TIMESTAMP,
  completed_at TIMESTAMP,
  metadata JSONB DEFAULT '{}',
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE INDEX idx_edit_jobs_trace_id ON edit_jobs(trace_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_edit_jobs_status ON edit_jobs(status);
```

---

## Enums

### memory_type
- `episodic` - Events, interactions, history
- `semantic` - Facts, rules, specifications
- `procedural` - Workflows, processes, how-tos

### trace_status
- `active` - Production run in progress
- `completed` - Successfully finished
- `failed` - Encountered blocking error

### job_status
- `queued` - Waiting to start
- `running` - In progress
- `succeeded` - Completed successfully
- `failed` - Encountered error
- `canceled` - Manually canceled

---

## Relationships

```
execution_traces
  ├─► project_id → projects.id
  └─► session_id → sessions.session_id

memories
  ├─► persona[] → personas.name
  ├─► project[] → projects.slug
  ├─► related_to[] → memories.id
  └─► metadata.traceId → execution_traces.trace_id

agent_webhooks
  └─► agent_name → personas.name

video_generation_jobs
  └─► trace_id → execution_traces.trace_id

edit_jobs
  └─► trace_id → execution_traces.trace_id
```

---

## Migrations

MyloWare uses a **single squashed migration** approach:
- All schema in `drizzle/0000_initial_schema.sql`
- No incremental migrations
- Schema changes require updating the squashed file

**Commands:**
```bash
# Reset local database
npm run db:reset -- --force

# Bootstrap (reset + migrate + seed)
npm run db:bootstrap -- --seed

# Migrate production
npm run db:migrate
```
